arts.ttl: Chelsea begin fresh talks over possibility of signing 25-year-old striker in January
arts.sum: Chelsea have not given up on signing Victor Osimhen. The 25-year-old was at the centre of the summer’s most intriguing transfer saga. Despite Napoli listening to offers for the Nigerian, long-time admirers Chelsea failed to reach an agreement. arts.ttl: We simulated Chelsea vs Barrow to get a score prediction for Carabao Cup clash
arts.sum: It seems that pieces of Enzo Maresca's plan have started to fall into place for Chelsea in recent weeks, with the Blues heading into tonight's clash following a 3-0 win away to West Ham United in the Premier League. Chelsea's 2024/25 Carabao Cup campaign will get underway later today when the Blues welcome League Two Barrow to Stamford Bridge.
